verses.text_he: בְּרֵאשִׁית בָּרָא אֱלֹהִים אֵת הַשָּׁמַיִם וְאֵת הָאָרֶץ
verses.transliteration: Bereshit bara Elohim et hashamayim ve'et ha'aretz
verses.translation_en: In the beginning God created the heavens and the earth

verses.text_he: וְהָאָרֶץ הָיְתָה תֹהוּ וָבֹהוּ וְחֹשֶׁךְ עַל־פְּנֵי תְהוֹם וְרוּחַ אֱלֹהִים מְרַחֶפֶת עַל־פְּנֵי הַמָּיִם
verses.transliteration: Ve'ha'aretz hayetah tohu vavohu vechoshech al-penei tehom veruach Elohim merachefet al-penei hamayim
verses.translation_en: Now the earth was formless and empty, darkness was over the surface of the deep, and the Spirit of God was hovering over the waters

verses.text_he: וַיֹּאמֶר אֱלֹהִים יְהִי אוֹר וַיְהִי־אוֹר
verses.transliteration: Vayomer Elohim yehi or vayehi-or
verses.translation_en: And God said, Let there be light, and there was light

verses.text_he: וַיַּרְא אֱלֹהִים אֶת־הָאוֹר כִּי־טוֹב וַיַּבְדֵּל אֱלֹהִים בֵּין הָאוֹר וּבֵין הַחֹשֶׁךְ
verses.transliteration: Vayar Elohim et-ha'or ki-tov vayavdel Elohim bein ha'or uvein hachoshech
verses.translation_en: God saw that the light was good, and he separated the light from the darkness

verses.text_he: וַיִּקְרָא אֱלֹהִים לָאוֹר יוֹם וְלַחֹשֶׁךְ קָרָא לָיְלָה וַיְהִי־עֶרֶב וַיְהִי־בֹקֶר יוֹם אֶחָד
verses.transliteration: Vayikra Elohim la'or yom velachoshech kara laylah vayehi-erev vayehi-voker yom echad
verses.translation_en: God called the light day, and the darkness he called night. And there was evening, and there was morning—the first day

verses.text_he: וַיֹּאמֶר אֱלֹהִים אֶל־מֹשֶׁה אֶהְיֶה אֲשֶׁר אֶהְיֶה וַיֹּאמֶר כֹּה תֹאמַר לִבְנֵי יִשְׂרָאֵל אֶהְיֶה שְׁלָחַנִי אֲלֵיכֶם
verses.transliteration: Vayomer Elohim el-Moshe ehyeh asher ehyeh vayomer koh tomar livnei Yisrael ehyeh shelachani aleichem
verses.translation_en: God said to Moses, I AM WHO I AM. And he said, Thus you shall say to the children of Israel, I AM has sent me to you

verses.text_he: וַיְדַבֵּר אֱלֹהִים אֵת כָּל־הַדְּבָרִים הָאֵלֶּה לֵאמֹר
verses.transliteration: Vayedaber Elohim et kol-hadevarim ha'eleh lemor
verses.translation_en: And God spoke all these words, saying

verses.text_he: אָנֹכִי יְהוָה אֱלֹהֶיךָ אֲשֶׁר הוֹצֵאתִיךָ מֵאֶרֶץ מִצְרַיִם מִבֵּית עֲבָדִים לֹא־יִהְיֶה לְךָ אֱלֹהִים אֲחֵרִים עַל־פָּנָי
verses.transliteration: Anochi YHWH Eloheicha asher hotzeticha me'eretz Mitzrayim mibeit avadim lo-yihyeh lecha elohim acherim al-panai
verses.translation_en: I am the LORD your God, who brought you out of the land of Egypt, out of the house of bondage. You shall have no other gods before Me

verses.text_he: לֹא תַעֲשֶׂה לְךָ פֶסֶל וְכָל־תְּמוּנָה
verses.transliteration: Lo ta'aseh lecha pesel vechol-temunah
verses.translation_en: You shall not make for yourself a carved image

verses.text_he: לֹא תִּרְצָח
verses.transliteration: Lo tirtzach
verses.translation_en: You shall not murder

verses.text_he: לֹא תִּנְאָף
verses.transliteration: Lo tinaf
verses.translation_en: You shall not commit adultery

verses.text_he: לֹא תִּגְנֹב
verses.transliteration: Lo tignov
verses.translation_en: You shall not steal

verses.text_he: לֹא־תִקֹּם וְלֹא־תִטֹּר אֶת־בְּנֵי עַמֶּךָ וְאָהַבְתָּ לְרֵעֲךָ כָּמוֹךָ אֲנִי יְהוָה
verses.transliteration: Lo-tikom velo-titor et-benei amecha ve'ahavta lere'acha kamocha ani YHWH
verses.translation_en: You shall not take vengeance, nor bear any grudge against the children of your people, but you shall love your neighbor as yourself: I am the LORD

verses.text_he: שְׁמַע יִשְׂרָאֵל יְהוָה אֱלֹהֵינוּ יְהוָה אֶחָד
verses.transliteration: Shema Yisrael YHWH Eloheinu YHWH echad
verses.translation_en: Hear, O Israel: The LORD our God, the LORD is One

verses.text_he: וְאָהַבְתָּ אֵת יְהוָה אֱלֹהֶיךָ בְּכָל־לְבָבְךָ וּבְכָל־נַפְשְׁךָ וּבְכָל־מְאֹדֶךָ
verses.transliteration: Ve'ahavta et YHWH Eloheicha bechol-levavcha uvechol-nafshecha uvechol-me'odecha
verses.translation_en: And you shall love the LORD your God with all your heart, with all your soul, and with all your strength

verses.text_he: אַשְׁרֵי הָאִישׁ אֲשֶׁר לֹא הָלַךְ בַּעֲצַת רְשָׁעִים וּבְדֶרֶךְ חַטָּאִים לֹא עָמָד וּבְמוֹשַׁב לֵצִים לֹא יָשָׁב
verses.transliteration: Ashrei ha'ish asher lo halach ba'atzat resha'im uvederech chatta'im lo amad uvmoshav leitzim lo yashav
verses.translation_en: Blessed is the man who walks not in the counsel of the ungodly, nor stands in the path of sinners, nor sits in the seat of the scornful

verses.text_he: יְהוָה רֹעִי לֹא אֶחְסָר
verses.transliteration: YHWH ro'i lo echsar
verses.translation_en: The LORD is my shepherd; I shall not want

verses.text_he: בִּנְאוֹת דֶּשֶׁא יַרְבִּיצֵנִי עַל־מֵי מְנֻחוֹת יְנַהֲלֵנִי
verses.transliteration: Bin'ot deshe yarbitzeni al-mei menuchot yenahaleni
verses.translation_en: He makes me to lie down in green pastures; He leads me beside the still waters

verses.text_he: גַּם כִּי־אֵלֵךְ בְּגֵיא צַלְמָוֶת לֹא־אִירָא רָע כִּי־אַתָּה עִמָּדִי שִׁבְטְךָ וּמִשְׁעַנְתֶּךָ הֵמָּה יְנַחֲמֻנִי
verses.transliteration: Gam ki-elech begei tzalmavet lo-ira ra ki-atah imadi shivtecha umish'antecha hemmah yenachamuni
verses.translation_en: Yea, though I walk through the valley of the shadow of death, I will fear no evil; for You are with me; Your rod and Your staff, they comfort me

verses.text_he: חָנֵּנִי אֱלֹהִים כְּחַסְדֶּךָ כְּרֹב רַחֲמֶיךָ מְחֵה פְשָׁעָי
verses.transliteration: Channeni Elohim kechasdecha kerov rachameicha mcheh pasha'ai
verses.translation_en: Have mercy upon me, O God, according to Your lovingkindness; according to the multitude of Your tender mercies, blot out my transgressions

verses.text_he: מִזְמוֹר לְתוֹדָה הָרִיעוּ לַיהוָה כָּל־הָאָרֶץ
verses.transliteration: Mizmor letodah hari'u laYHWH kol-ha'aretz
verses.translation_en: Make a joyful noise to the LORD, all the earth

verses.text_he: הוֹדוּ לַיהוָה כִּי־טוֹב כִּי לְעוֹלָם חַסְדּוֹ
verses.transliteration: Hodu laYHWH ki-tov ki le'olam chasdo
verses.translation_en: Give thanks to the LORD, for He is good; for His mercy endures forever

verses.text_he: נֵר־לְרַגְלִי דְבָרֶךָ וְאוֹר לִנְתִיבָתִי
verses.transliteration: Ner leragli dvarcha ve'or lintivati
verses.translation_en: Your word is a lamp to my feet and a light to my path

verses.text_he: יְהוָה חֲקַרְתַּנִי וַתֵּדָע
verses.transliteration: YHWH chakartani vateda
verses.translation_en: O LORD, You have searched me and known me

verses.text_he: כֹּל הַנְּשָׁמָה תְּהַלֵּל יָהּ הַלְלוּיָהּ
verses.transliteration: Kol haneshamah tehalel Yah Halleluyah
verses.translation_en: Let everything that has breath praise the LORD. Praise the LORD
